case.title: ST. PETER'S PARISH v. URBAN AUTHORITY

opinion.h: ST. PETER'S PARISH v. URBAN AUTHORITY, 359 U.S. 435 (1959)
ST. PETER'S ROMAN CATHOLIC PARISH v. URBAN REDEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY OF PITTSBURGH ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA, WESTERN DISTRICT. No. 749. Decided May 4, 1959.
opinion.p: Theodore L. Hazlett, Jr. and R. J. Hopkins for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
